C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc libSmartCityCore.a CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/graph/RoadNetwork.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/io/FileParser.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/io/Reporter.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/main.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/optimizer/RouteOptimizer.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/scheduler/DeliveryScheduler.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/spatial/QuadTree.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/system/CityMapManager.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/system/EntityManager.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/system/SmartCitySystem.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/system/SpatialQueryEngine.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/SmartCityCore.dir/src/system/TrafficMonitor.cpp.obj
C:\MinGW\bin\ranlib.exe libSmartCityCore.a
